Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT T0."OpprId" AS "OpportunityNo", T0."CardCode", T0."CardName", T1."Name" AS "ContactPerson", T2."SlpName" AS "SalesEmployee", ((SELECT SUM(TS0."DocTotal") FROM OINV TS0 WHERE TS0."CardCode" = T0."CardCode") - (SELECT SUM(TS1."DocTotal") FROM ORIN TS1 WHERE TS1."CardCode" = T0."CardCode")) AS "AccountSize", T3."Descript" AS "Source", T4."Descript" AS "PrimaryInterest", T5."Descript" AS "InterestLevel", T0."CloPrcnt", T0."OpenDate", T0."CloseDate", T0."MaxSumSys" AS "PotentialAmount", T0."WtSumSys" AS "WeightedAmount", T0."PrcnProf" AS "GrossProfitPercentage", T0."SumProfS" AS "GRossProfitTotal", T0."Memo" AS "Remarks", T0."Status", T0."RealSumSys" AS "TotalAmount" FROM OOPR T0 LEFT OUTER JOIN OCPR T1 ON T0."CprCode" = T1."CntctCode" INNER JOIN OSLP T2 ON T0."SlpCode" = T2."SlpCode" LEFT OUTER JOIN OOSR T3 ON T0."Source" = T3."Num" LEFT OUTER JOIN OOIN T4 ON T0."IntCat1" = T4."Num" LEFT OUTER JOIN OOIR T5 ON T0."IntRate" = T5."Num" WHERE T0."OpprId" = {?DocKey@}

Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: SELECT T0."OpprId", T0."OpenDate", T0."CloseDate", T1."SlpName" AS "SalesEmployee", T2."Descript" AS "Stage", T0."ClosePrcnt", T0."WtSumSys" FROM "OPR1" T0 JOIN "OSLP" T1 ON T0."SlpCode" = T1."SlpCode" JOIN "OOST" T2 ON T0."Step_Id" = T2."Num" WHERE T0."OpprId" = {?DocKey@}

FormulaFieldDefinitions.FormulaFieldDefinition: switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Grad af interesse', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Interessensgrad', True, 'Interest Level'//Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Potentielt beløb', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Potenzieller Betrag', True, 'Potential Amount'//Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Vægtet beløb', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Gewichteter Betrag', True, 'Weighted Amount'//Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Potentielt beløb', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Potenzieller Betrag', True, 'Potential Amount'//Default English )
switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Vægtet beløb', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Gewichteter Betrag', True, 'Weighted Amount'//Default English )
